{{Quote|The first Reecee knew of the attack was when they swarmed the base shields. We thought they were some sort of mynock at first, but when we tried to transmit, they pulled the signal in like a black hole.|New Republic soldier|<ref name="Star by Star" />}}
The '''Battle of Reecee''' was a battle of [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Part of [[Tsavong Lah]]'s [[Battle Plan Coruscant]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] force took [[Reecee/Legends|Reecee]] to use as a staging area for the attack on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], enabling them to bypass the [[Bilbringi Shipyards]]. The Yuuzhan Vong used a type of [[dovin basal]] to prevent communications from the besieged forces, making sure the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] was unaware of the [[Planet/Legends|world's]] fall.

A small number of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] were able to escape onboard the ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'', which had been hiding the [[Jedi Praxeum]] students near Reecee, to [[Eclipse Station]].
